rationale: Both evaluations hold the score at 8/10, flag the identical must-have gap (Python), and raise the same concern about the brevity of the recent AI-agent role. The wording differs (e.g., the variant adds a 'ramp-up period' note about Node.js/DLang and emphasizes Staff/founder leadership), but these are reworded restatements of the same underlying assessment and fall within ordinary run-to-run variation. Nothing in the variant references location, geography, or any signal tied to the Berlin-to-San-Francisco change.
